title: ptilagrostis bhutanica
intro: Ptilagrostis bhutanica, also known as Bhutan grass, is a type of grass native to the Himalayas and other high-altitude mountain ranges in Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ptilagrostis bhutanica is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
